scope: Classifies supplied modified-gravity, QICT, interacting-dark-sector, and speculative SSRN dark-sector sources without promoting any theorem, empirical validation, or physical-discovery claim.

sources.title: Pathology of the Unified Dark Sectors in Modified General Relativity
sources.alignment: Modified General Relativity / unified-dark-sector pathology signal; admissible only as a boundary against promoting unified dark-sector alternatives without stability control.

sources.title: QICT Cosmology with Complex-Phase Dark Sector: Late-Time Dynamics and Implications for H0 and S8 Tensions
sources.alignment: QICT open-system / complex-phase dark-sector model source; not peer-reviewed and not treated as empirical validation.

sources.title: Strong Evidence for Dark Sector Interactions
sources.alignment: Interacting-dark-sector evidence-source signal using CMB, DESI BAO, and supernova data; not validation of any internal model.

sources.title: Beyond Matter II: Deterministic Resolution of Dark Energy, Dark Matter, and Cosmic Microwave Background Anomalies via Hendeca-Tier Informational Pressure (10^66)
sources.alignment: Speculative external dark-sector/cosmology claim source; admissible only as a boundary-source record, not as evidence or theorem support.
